caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" written in gold lettering is speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. He is seated in a studio setting with a white backdrop featuring gold stars and the words "URBAN HUSTLE." Behind him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his side, a black equipment case and a white mug with red and blue text, including "BOSS TALK," are visible on a dark table. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his head and mouth, while the camera angle and overall composition of the scene remain static. He appears to be recording a podcast or broadcast, maintaining a focused expression as he talks.
